description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a low, wide seat and a gently reclined backrest, both upholstered in a light beige fabric. The seat and backrest are segmented into three horizontal, cushioned sections, providing both comfort and visual interest. The frame is constructed from black metal, forming a distinctive X-shaped base that supports the seat and backrest. The legs are slender and angular, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic and ensuring stability. The upholstery appears smooth and slightly padded, with subtle horizontal indentations that enhance the ergonomic profile. This piece is well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or stylish outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern chaise with light beige segmented upholstery and a black metal X-shaped frame, featuring a low, wide seat and reclined backrest. The design is sleek, cushioned, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's reclined backrest, segmented cushions, and the full X-shaped black metal base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the backrest, the black metal frame, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the chaise's profile, cushion segmentation, and angular base.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the wide, flat seat, the three horizontal cushion segments, and the open, armless design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, gently reclined, and segmented into three horizontal cushioned sections, providing ergonomic support and a modern visual appeal. It is smoothly upholstered with subtle horizontal indentations and lacks any decorative buttons or cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the chaise has an open, armless design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are constructed from black metal and form an angular, X-shaped base that is both sturdy and visually distinctive. The legs are slender, straight, and have a matte finish, contributing to the contemporary style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid beige with a smooth texture and features horizontal segmentation, creating a subtle, quilted appearance without any visible patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three attached, horizontally segmented cushions that form both the seat and backrest, providing continuous support and a streamlined look. The cushions are integrated into the structure and evenly spaced.
